title: Employees Who Are Managers
description: Write a query to fetch all employees who are also managers in the EmployeeDetails table.
checklist: Check ManagerId values present in the table
Return records for employees who appear as managers
detailedInstructions: Step 1: Identify manager IDs from EmployeeDetails
Step 2: Fetch employees whose EmpId matches a manager ID
Step 3: Return the matching employee records
starterCode:
-- 1: Select all columns from EmployeeDetails
-- 2: Filter employees whose EmpId appears as a ManagerId
-- 3: Return manager employee rows

hints.guide: Use a subquery to find manager IDs
hints.code:
FROM EmployeeDetails
WHERE EmpId IN (SELECT ManagerId FROM EmployeeDetails WHERE ManagerId IS NOT NULL);
